name: Gonzales Municipal Park Tennis Center
description: Gonzales Municipal Park Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gonzales, LA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Lamar Dixon Expo Center
description: Lamar Dixon Expo Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gonzales, LA. There are 8 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
